channel.title: SCHW — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on SCHW (Charles Schwab) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED SCHW (-25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed SCHW in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED SCHW (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed SCHW in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED SCHW (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q4 2025 · 19.6% of portfolio. Concentrating further on top conviction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Glenn Greenberg)

item.title: John Armitage: NEW POSITION SCHW · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) new position SCHW in Q4 2025 · 4.7% of portfolio. New Schwab position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (John Armitage)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED SCHW (+21%) · Q3 2025

item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q3 2025 · 17.8% of portfolio. Top conviction add.
